behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all key paths (src/server/services/email/impls/resend/, src/envs/email.ts, src/server/services/email/index.ts, README.md, AGENTS.md), env var names (RESEND_API_KEY, RESEND_FROM, EMAIL_SERVICE_PROVIDER), enum value 'resend', and required strings ('## Project Description', 'LobeHub', 'AI Agent Workspace').

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what needs to exist and behavior, not exact code edits.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert on specific identifiers like 'class ResendImpl', 'EmailImplType.Resend', 'new ResendImpl()', and regex /Resend\s*=\s*'resend'/ — alternative valid implementations using different class/enum names would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Most fail-to-pass tests (test_resend_impl_file_structure, test_enum_includes_resend, test_env_configures_resend_vars, test_email_service_resolves_provider, test_email_readme_documents_resend, test_agents_md_has_project_description) are pure substring/regex checks on source files; only the repo_tests gates execute code.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub returning defaults could not satisfy substring checks for class names, enum values, env var names, and the README/AGENTS.md content together.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All instruction requirements (impl class, factory enum, env vars, provider selection, README, AGENTS.md) have corresponding tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped by section comments (Gates pass_to_pass, repo_tests, fail_to_pass, config/documentation).

structured_data_schema.reason: Task does not produce structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers are consistent across instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files because creating/editing them is the task itself, not a hidden bug localization.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold patch makes localized additions to AGENTS.md, README, env file, and adds a new impl directory; no full-file rewrites.
